specifications.name: Resistance Value
specifications.notes: Standard values follow IEC 60063 preferred number series

specifications.name: Tolerance
specifications.notes: Metal film resistors achieve ±1%; carbon film typically ±5%

specifications.name: Power Rating
specifications.notes: Higher power ratings require physically larger packages

specifications.name: Temperature Coefficient
specifications.notes: Lower values indicate better stability across temperature

specifications.name: Maximum Voltage
specifications.notes: Depends on body size and material composition

specifications.name: Operating Temperature
specifications.notes: Industrial grade resistors have wider ranges
